item.title: Introducing Beautiful HTML Templates: I made some stunning HTML slide templates & open-sourc...
item.description:
Introducing Beautiful HTML Templates: I made some stunning HTML slide templates &amp; open-sourced them
If you use this template system, it will literally be impossible for your agent to produce something ugly
Link below https://t.co/quf2fzlEGG
--- @zarazhangrui | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 2
item.author: @zarazhangrui

item.title:
Binance Online: Setting the Stage. May 6 | 13:00 UTC
Livestream with Chromia, Epic, Fusionist, Pix...
item.description:
Binance Online: Setting the Stage. May 6 | 13:00 UTC
Livestream with Chromia, Epic, Fusionist, Pixels, and Zerobase
Get a first look at the agenda, speakers, and activations plus 2,000 USDC in red packets.
Set your reminder → https://t.co/Kdjqx81pPz https://t.co/6AKl4swsMi
--- @binance | ❤️ 6 | 🔁 1 | 💬 2 | 👁 470
item.author: @binance
